value.found_quote: MCP tools require explicit permission before Claude can use them. Without permission, Claude will see that tools are available but won't be able to call them. ... Wildcards (`*`) let you allow all tools from a server without listing each one individually.
value.rationale: The page describes the "Allow MCP tools" feature requiring explicit permission, and documents allowedTools with wildcard support to permit all tools from a server, matching the claim.
